rationale: Phase 07 satisfies the approved plan: schema changes are additive, saved-search writes are canonical/query-hash aligned, alert subscriptions and deliveries are durable and idempotent, ALERT_MATCH/ALERT_DELIVER are wired into outbox handling, and final delivery revalidates current preferences, pass state, subscription state, and target visibility before email or notification creation. The disable-alerts kill switch pauses work without deleting pending rows.

checks.command: pnpm test -- --runTestsByPath src/__tests__/db/phase07-schema.test.ts src/__tests__/actions/saved-search.test.ts src/__tests__/actions/saved-search-reopen.test.ts src/__tests__/app/saved-searches/SavedSearchList.test.tsx src/__tests__/components/SaveSearchButton.test.tsx src/__tests__/api/cron/search-alerts.test.ts src/__tests__/lib/search-alerts.test.ts src/__tests__/lib/search-alerts-telemetry.test.ts src/__tests__/lib/payments/search-alert-paywall.test.ts src/__tests__/lib/outbox/handlers.test.ts src/__tests__/lib/outbox/drain.test.ts --runInBand
